DisclosedMetricFamily: Pathloss/ToA prediction error; MAE/RMSE-style map error; localization-oriented scores
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Transmitter split; environment split; sparse-sample setting; challenge scoring rule
WCIInterpretation: Common 2D benchmark; gains may reflect raster conventions or local spatial correlation.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Sparse-measurement REM reconstruction error; U-Net/CGAN baseline results
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Measurement sparsity; cross-area setting; RSRP generation process; baseline configuration
WCIInterpretation: Sparse-measurement performance is meaningful only when mask and area split are stated.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Multiband/3D reconstruction or generative fidelity metrics
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Frequency; terrain; altitude; climate/context labels; train/test scenario separation
WCIInterpretation: 3D coverage accuracy should be interpreted with band and height transfer.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Volumetric pathloss-map error; image/volume fidelity; generative comparison metrics
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: City/environment split; 3D descriptor availability; receiver-height convention; dataset version
WCIInterpretation: Volumetric maps expose low-altitude behavior but remain simulator- and split-dependent.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Pathloss estimation error; inference speed; parameter-efficiency indicators
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Indoor scenario split; receiver-height variation; training-set size; model variant
WCIInterpretation: Height-aware indoor protocols should not be generalized to outdoor UAV maps without new evidence.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Multi-step future-map forecasting error; temporal prediction metrics
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Forecast horizon; vehicle trajectory generation; train/test temporal split; static vs dynamic baselines
WCIInterpretation: Forecasting is closer to operational WCI but should be tied to map age and control utility.

DisclosedMetricFamily: Channel-knowledge prediction metrics for gain, delay, angle, and related layers
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Channel descriptor type; supervised/unsupervised/generative protocol; scenario split; environmental representation
WCIInterpretation: CKM scores are not directly comparable with scalar pathloss-map RMSE.

DisclosedMetricFamily: MSE/MAE/PSNR under ultra-sparse 3D construction and zero-shot real-measurement transfer
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Frequency; target height; sample count; candidate count; model size; SpectrumNet/AERPAW split; checkpoint provenance
WCIInterpretation: Strong 3D/low-altitude result card, but deployment claims require provenance, uncertainty, and downstream utility evidence.

DisclosedMetricFamily: RMSE on reserved RadioMap3DSeer competition test protocol
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Reserved split; tensor-level RMSE definition; propagation-model feature generation; ablation; metric script
WCIInterpretation: Journal-backed benchmark update; not a full open-source reproduction line until code and checkpoint evidence are public.

DisclosedMetricFamily: RSRP RMSE; Wireless InSite mismatch; GPR sampling-efficiency values
ProtocolFieldsToCheck: Measurement geometry; UAV height planes; simulator calibration; kernel choice; sampling-rate mask
WCIInterpretation: Real low-altitude measurement evidence; open reproducibility remains bounded by data/code availability.
